name: GENTEX CORP
summary: Gentex Corporation designs, develops, manufactures, and markets digital vision, connected car, premium audio, dimmable glass, fire protection, medical device, and consumer electronic technologies. Key products include electrochromic automatic-dimming rearview mirrors and electronics for the automotive industry, HomeLink wireless vehicle/home communications, Full Display Mirror (FDM), dimmable aircraft windows for aviation, smoke alarms and signaling devices for fire protection, and premium audio brands including Klipsch, Onkyo, and Integra through the acquired VOXX subsidiary.
